Shows the ShipLog logo throughout the GUI, not only in the Plugins tab.

## Changed
- The **Settings menu icon** is now the ShipLog logo (`Icon="shiplog.png"`)
  instead of the FontAwesome anchor glyph.
- The **settings page header** shows the logo instead of the anchor emoji (⚓).

The logo already ships under `icons/` and `images/`, so this is the FanCtrlPlus
convention applied to the in-GUI surfaces.
